attributes.description: The type of menu item to render. To use `checked`, this value must be set to `checkbox`.
attributes.name: type

attributes.description: Draws the item in a checked state.
attributes.name: checked

attributes.description: A unique value to store in the menu item. This can be used as a way to identify menu items when selected.
attributes.name: value

attributes.description: Draws the menu item in a loading state.
attributes.name: loading

attributes.description: Draws the menu item in a disabled state, preventing selection.
attributes.name: disabled

cssParts.description: The checked icon, which is only visible when the menu item is checked.
cssParts.name: checked-icon

cssParts.description: The spinner that shows when the menu item is in the loading state.
cssParts.name: spinner

cssParts.description: The submenu icon, visible only when the menu item has a submenu (not yet implemented).
cssParts.name: submenu-icon

methods.description: Returns a text label based on the contents of the menu item's default slot.
methods.name: getTextLabel

properties.description: The type of menu item to render. To use `checked`, this value must be set to `checkbox`.
properties.name: type

properties.description: Draws the item in a checked state.
properties.name: checked

properties.description: A unique value to store in the menu item. This can be used as a way to identify menu items when selected.
properties.name: value

properties.description: Draws the menu item in a loading state.
properties.name: loading

properties.description: Draws the menu item in a disabled state, preventing selection.
properties.name: disabled

slots.description: Used to prepend an icon or similar element to the menu item.
slots.name: prefix

slots.description: Used to append an icon or similar element to the menu item.
slots.name: suffix

slots.description: Used to denote a nested menu.
slots.name: submenu

summary: Menu items provide options for the user to pick from in a menu.
